chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.195 of 2024 National Highway Authority Versus Binapuri Pakistan (Pvt.) Limited DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For order on CMA No.1152/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection a/w reply as at “A”. 3. For order on CMA No.1153/2024 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For order on CMA No.1154/2024 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 20.05.2024 Mr. Imran Ali Mithani, Advocate for the appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Omer Memon, learned counsel files Vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent, which is taken on record. The impugned order in this appeal is only an ad-interim order attaching the account of the judgment-debtor. Learned counsel for the appellant may explain himself as to why the account is not liable to be attached before the execution is taken to its logical end. The appeal merits no consideration and is dismissed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
